testcase.name: test_fixtures_aggregated_shape_and_volume

failure.message: AssertionError: expected >=100 events, got 53 assert 53 >= 100 + where 53 = len([{'away': 'Chennai Super Kings', 'awayBadge': 'https://r2.thesportsdb.com/images/media/team/badge/okceh51487601098.png', 'awayScore': '', 'city': 'Lucknow', ...}, {'away': 'Sweden Ice Hockey', 'awayBadge': 'https://r2.thesportsdb.com/images/media/team/badge/35jges1767984000.png', 'awayScore': '', 'city': 'Fribourg', ...}, {'away': 'Germany Ice Hockey', 'awayBadge': 'https://r2.thesportsdb.com/images/media/team/badge/itlfzg1621041217.png', 'awayScore': '', 'city': 'Zürich', ...}, {'away': 'Kazincbarcika', 'awayBadge': 'https://r2.thesportsdb.com/images/media/team/badge/957alm1617288444.png', 'awayScore': '', 'city': '', ...}, {'away': 'MTK Budapest', 'awayBadge': 'https://r2.thesportsdb.com/images/media/team/badge/brw5tj1688115226.png', 'awayScore': '', 'city': '', ...}, {'away': 'Denmark Ice Hockey', 'awayBadge': 'https://r2.thesportsdb.com/images/media/team/badge/fb4j3a1621067469.png', 'awayScore': '', 'city': 'Fribourg', ...}, ...])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_sportsdb.py:73: in test_fixtures_aggregated_shape_and_volume assert len(events) >= 100, f"expected >=100 events, got {len(events)}" E AssertionError: expected >=100 events, got 53 E assert 53 >= 100 E + where 53 = len([{'away': 'Chennai Super Kings', 'awayBadge': 'https://r2.thesportsdb.com/images/media/team/badge/okceh51487601098.png', 'awayScore': '', 'city': 'Lucknow', ...}, {'away': 'Sweden Ice Hockey', 'awayBadge': 'https://r2.thesportsdb.com/images/media/team/badge/35jges1767984000.png', 'awayScore': '', 'city': 'Fribourg', ...}, {'away': 'Germany Ice Hockey', 'awayBadge': 'https://r2.thesportsdb.com/images/media/team/badge/itlfzg1621041217.png', 'awayScore': '', 'city': 'Zürich', ...}, {'away': 'Kazincbarcika', 'awayBadge': 'https://r2.thesportsdb.com/images/media/team/badge/957alm1617288444.png', 'awayScore': '', 'city': '', ...}, {'away': 'MTK Budapest', 'awayBadge': 'https://r2.thesportsdb.com/images/media/team/badge/brw5tj1688115226.png', 'awayScore': '', 'city': '', ...}, {'away': 'Denmark Ice Hockey', 'awayBadge': 'https://r2.thesportsdb.com/images/media/team/badge/fb4j3a1621067469.png', 'awayScore': '', 'city': 'Fribourg', ...}, ...])

testcase.name: test_img_proxy_alive

skipped.message: No badge URL available in fixtures payload to test img-proxy
